Class ToppingItem

java.lang.Object
ToppingItem
public class ToppingItem extends Object
Stores data meant to represenet a row in the Toppings table
  • Topping Id
  • Topping name
  • Topping Price
  • Current Active status

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ToppingItem()
    Default Constructor
    ToppingItem(String toppingName, double toppingPrice, String status)
    Represents one row element in the Toppings table

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getItemId()
    Retrieves unique identifier of the row in the form of an integer
    String
    getItemName()
    Retrieves the item's name in the form of a string object

    Retrieves the row's price value
    String
    getStatus()
    Returns activity status in the form of a string.
    boolean

    Returns activity status in the form of a boolean

    Sets the local object's unique id with the respective input integer value
    void

    Changes the row's name value with the input

    Changes the row's price value

  • Constructor Details

    • ToppingItem

      public ToppingItem()
      Default Constructor

    • ToppingItem

      public ToppingItem(String toppingName, double toppingPrice, String status)
      Represents one row element in the Toppings table
      Parameters:
      toppingName - topping_name column
      toppingPrice - topping_price column
      status - status column

  • Method Details

    • getItemId

      public int getItemId()
      Retrieves unique identifier of the row in the form of an integer
      Returns:
      Integer value holding unique id

    • setItemId

      public void setItemId(int toppingId)
      Sets the local object's unique id with the respective input integer value
      Parameters:
      toppingId - New Unique id being set

    • getItemName

      public String getItemName()
      Retrieves the item's name in the form of a string object
      Returns:
      String object holding the item's name

    • setItemName

      public void setItemName(String toppingName)
      Changes the row's name value with the input
      Parameters:
      toppingName - String object holding the new input id

    • getItemPrice

      public double getItemPrice()
      Retrieves the row's price value
      Returns:
      Price value of the row in the form of a float

    • setItemPrice

      public void setItemPrice(double toppingPrice)
      Changes the row's price value
      Parameters:
      toppingPrice - New price value after the change

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Manually sets the row's status value
      Parameters:
      status - New status after the change. Reccomended only: 'Active' or 'Inactive'

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Returns activity status in the form of a string.
      Returns:
      Active or Inactive in the form of a string

    • isActive

      public boolean isActive()
      Returns activity status in the form of a boolean
      Returns:
      True for active items; false for inactive items
